prompt:
You are implementing a Vue 3 registration form in a Turborepo monorepo.

## Task

Implement TWO files **in this order**:

1. `apps/web/src/registration/types/index.ts` — Zod schema + TypeScript type
2. `apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue` — Vue SFC using the `elements` package

Write `types/index.ts` **first** so that RegistrationForm.vue can import from it.
Use `write_file` to write each file, then `run_compilation` to check for TypeScript errors.
`write_file` only writes the file and returns `"File written."` — it does NOT compile.
After each write, call `run_compilation` to get feedback and fix any errors before moving on.

**Use `query_rag` to look up component API examples before writing any code.** The tool has code examples for all available form components and patterns.

### Required fields

| Field       | Component             | Constraints                                                                 |
|-------------|----------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `username`  | ControlledInput       | required, min 3 chars                                                       |
| `email`     | ControlledInput       | type="email", required, valid email                                         |
| `role`      | ControlledRadioGroup  | options: "user", "admin", "contributor"                                    |
| `otherInfo` | ControlledInput       | visible only when `role === "contributor"`                                  |
| `newsletter`| ControlledCheckbox    |                                                                             |
| `frequency` | ControlledRadioGroup  | options: "daily", "weekly", "monthly"; visible only when `newsletter` true  |
| `bio`       | ControlledTextarea    | optional                                                                    |

### Conditional validation

Use Zod `.superRefine()` for cross-field rules:
- `otherInfo` required when `role === "contributor"`
- `frequency` required when `newsletter === true`

naming_violations: Variable 'ROLE_OPTIONS' is not camelCase (must start with lowercase letter)
Variable 'FREQUENCY_OPTIONS' is not camelCase (must start with lowercase letter)

args.answer:
Both files have been successfully implemented:

1. **`apps/web/src/registration/types/index.ts`** - Contains:
   - Zod schema with conditional validation via `.superRefine()`:
     - `otherInfo` required when `role === 'contributor'`
     - `frequency` required when `newsletter === true`
   - TypeScript types: `RegistrationFormValues`, `Role`, `Frequency`
   - Exported options arrays: `ROLE_OPTIONS`, `FREQUENCY_OPTIONS`

2. **`apps/web/src/registration/components/RegistrationForm.vue`** - Complete Vue 3 SFC with:
   - All required fields mapped correctly:
     - `username`: ControlledInput with min 3 chars validation
     - `email`: ControlledInput with type="email" and email validation
     - `role`: ControlledRadioGroup with 3 options
     - `otherInfo`: ControlledInput conditionally shown via `v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"`
     - `newsletter`: ControlledCheckbox
     - `frequency`: ControlledRadioGroup conditionally shown via `v-if="form.values.newsletter"`
     - `bio`: ControlledTextarea (optional)
   - Uses `form.values` from FormFields slot for reactive conditional rendering
   - All fields use `@input-click="resetGeneralError"` pattern
   - FormActions properly disabled based on `isValid` and `isSubmitting`

Compilation succeeded with no TypeScript errors.

runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { FormFields, FormActions, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledTextarea, Button, Form } from "elements"
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues, type RegistrationFormValues } from "../types/index.js"

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
]

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
]

const onSubmit = async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
  console.log("Form submitted:", values)
  return values
}

const actions = { onSubmit }
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        type="text"
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        type="email"
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        placeholder="Enter email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Information"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Write a short bio"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button type="submit" :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value">
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

args.content:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { FormFields, FormActions, ControlledInput, ControlledRadioGroup, ControlledCheckbox, ControlledTextarea, Button, Form } from "elements"
import { registrationSchema, registrationInitialValues, type RegistrationFormValues } from "../types/index.js"

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
]

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
]

const onSubmit = async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
  console.log("Form submitted:", values)
  return values
}

const actions = { onSubmit }
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <ControlledInput
        type="text"
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        type="email"
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        placeholder="Enter email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Information"
        placeholder="Describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Write a short bio"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button type="submit" :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value">
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

runs.output_code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";
import {
  type RegistrationFormValues,
  registrationInitialValues,
  registrationSchema,
} from "../types";
import { ref } from "vue";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username field -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email field -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role selection -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo field - only visible when role is contributor -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info"
        placeholder="Please describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency selection - only visible when newsletter is true -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Email frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio field -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import {
  Button,
  ControlledCheckbox,
  ControlledInput,
  ControlledRadioGroup,
  ControlledTextarea,
  Form,
  FormActions,
  FormFields,
} from "elements";
import { z } from "zod";
import {
  type RegistrationFormValues,
  registrationInitialValues,
  registrationSchema,
} from "../types";
import { ref } from "vue";

const roleOptions = [
  { value: "user", label: "User" },
  { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
  { value: "contributor", label: "Contributor" },
];

const frequencyOptions = [
  { value: "daily", label: "Daily" },
  { value: "weekly", label: "Weekly" },
  { value: "monthly", label: "Monthly" },
];

const actions = {
  onSubmit: async (values: RegistrationFormValues) => {
    console.log("Form submitted:", values);
    return values;
  },
};
</script>

<template>
  <Form
    :initial-values="registrationInitialValues"
    :form-schema="registrationSchema"
    :actions="actions"
  >
    <FormFields v-slot="{ form, resetGeneralError }">
      <!-- Username field -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="username"
        label="Username"
        placeholder="Enter your username"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Email field -->
      <ControlledInput
        name="email"
        label="Email"
        type="email"
        placeholder="Enter your email"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Role selection -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        name="role"
        label="Role"
        :options="roleOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- otherInfo field - only visible when role is contributor -->
      <ControlledInput
        v-if="form.values.role === 'contributor'"
        name="otherInfo"
        label="Other Info"
        placeholder="Please describe your contribution"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Newsletter checkbox -->
      <ControlledCheckbox
        name="newsletter"
        label="Subscribe to newsletter"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Frequency selection - only visible when newsletter is true -->
      <ControlledRadioGroup
        v-if="form.values.newsletter"
        name="frequency"
        label="Email frequency"
        :options="frequencyOptions"
        orientation="horizontal"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />

      <!-- Bio field -->
      <ControlledTextarea
        name="bio"
        label="Bio"
        placeholder="Tell us about yourself"
        @input-click="resetGeneralError"
      />
    </FormFields>

    <FormActions v-slot="{ form, isValid }">
      <Button
        type="submit"
        :disabled="!isValid || form?.isSubmitting.value"
      >
        Register
      </Button>
    </FormActions>
  </Form>
</template>
